shared.empty: No server-status snapshot is available yet

runtimePage.title: Runtime
runtimePage.subtitle: Inspect the current Go process snapshot, build details, and server environment while keeping server memory separate from Go Runtime memory.
runtimePage.memoryBoundaryNotice: Memory scope: server memory covers the whole server, while Go Runtime memory covers only the current service process.
runtimePage.runtimeMemoryDescription: Current in-process memory usage and garbage collection snapshot.
runtimePage.processBuildDescription: Current service build and runtime identity.
runtimePage.serverEnvironmentDescription: Whole-server memory snapshot, not the same as Go Runtime memory.

summary.runtimeAllocDescription: Currently allocated by the Go runtime

fieldDescriptions.runtimeAlloc: Bytes currently allocated by the Go runtime.
fieldDescriptions.runtimeHeap: Heap bytes actively used by the Go process.
fieldDescriptions.runtimeSys: Total memory requested from the system by the Go runtime.
fieldDescriptions.gcCycles: Current snapshot of completed GC cycles.
fieldDescriptions.lastGc: Reserved until the backend exposes the most recent GC timestamp.
fieldDescriptions.buildVersion: Uses the current backend version field when present.
fieldDescriptions.gitCommit: Reserved until the backend exposes an explicit commit identifier.
fieldDescriptions.appName: Application identifier reported by the service.
fieldDescriptions.hostName: Server host name reported by the runtime snapshot.
fieldDescriptions.platform: Operating system and architecture for the host.
fieldDescriptions.cpuCores: Logical CPU core count visible to the process.
fieldDescriptions.hostMemory: Whole-server memory snapshot, not Go Runtime memory.
fieldDescriptions.observedAt: Timestamp of the latest aggregated snapshot.
fieldDescriptions.loadAverage: 1m / 5m / 15m load averages from the current server.

dependenciesPage.title: Dependencies
dependenciesPage.subtitle: Review health signals for PostgreSQL, Redis, and the future extension point for plugin-owned dependency checks.
dependenciesPage.noteDescription: The current page reflects the latest aggregated snapshot. Additional services can show their own health checks here as they become available.
dependenciesPage.futureEntryHint: Additional service checks can appear here as plugin capabilities are enabled over time.
dependenciesPage.futureEntryDescription: This card will show new dependency checks when they are available.

summary.lastCheckDescription: Time of the latest aggregated snapshot

fieldDescriptions.checkedAt: Currently follows the latest server-status snapshot time.
fieldDescriptions.errorInfo: Shows the latest error only when the dependency is abnormal or unknown.
fieldDescriptions.detail: Raw probe detail returned by the current backend snapshot.
